name: git-toolkit
description: Safe, scale-aware git + GitHub toolkit for AI agents - one front-door skill that runs git/github work in a delegated context so the caller stays clean and code is never lost. 1 skill + 4 agents (read-only surveyor, write operator, GitHub operator, pipeline lead). Backup-before/verify-after on destructive ops, never-read-huge-diff scale protocol, MCP-first GitHub via the auto-installed github plugin, and convention-aware commit messages.
